Triggering the dual circuit breaker of Extreme Scope Stuffing and high-altitude physical demotion. The false Apple multinational OEM ecosystem generated by AI in the original data has been completely purified. This enterprise, named 'Jiyu Technology,' has a business license 500 words long, reading like a science fiction novel: bragging all the way from 'intelligent unmanned aerial vehicle manufacturing' and 'special operation robot manufacturing' to 'integrated circuit manufacturing,' 'additive manufacturing (3D printing),' and 'geographic remote sensing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its physical baseline: an insured headcount of only 6 people, and a paid-in capital of 5.74 million. Even more fatal is its spatial probe result: 'Room 2-1001, Building 2, Huamai International Plaza.' Huamai International Plaza is a typical commercial high-rise office building in Jiangning District, and 'Room 1001' means it's on the 10th floor. In a single 10th-floor office room, relying on 6 people to manufacture drones, industrial robots, or even integrated circuits? This is not only an absolute joke in terms of physics but also a crazy provocation to fire and environmental regulations. Ignoring all 'manufacturing' words, the probe locked onto its true survival logic: 'software development, technical consulting, electronic product sales, advertising production.' The truth comes to light: this is absolutely not a super factory encompassing half of heavy industry, but a typical Office-based R&D Studio & Trading Shell. These 6 people are highly likely conducting 'software control system development' for drones or robots in the office building, or simply acting as sales agents for various tech hardware, or even taking on freelance tech advertising gigs. The facade of the 'super manufacturing plant' has been thoroughly stripped and demoted by the system.
